import sys
from collections import deque

def solve():
    input = sys.stdin.read().split()
    ptr = 0
    t = int(input[ptr])
    ptr += 1
    for _ in range(t):
        n, m = map(int, input[ptr:ptr+2])
        ptr +=2
        adj = [[] for _ in range(n+1)]
        for __ in range(m):
            i, j, c = input[ptr], input[ptr+1], input[ptr+2]
            ptr +=3
            i = int(i)
            j = int(j)
            if c == 'imposter':
                adj[i].append((j, 1))
                adj[j].append((i, 1))
            else:
                adj[i].append((j, 0))
                adj[j].append((i, 0))
        
        color = [-1]*(n+1)
        possible = True
        total = 0
        for i in range(1, n+1):
            if color[i] == -1:
                q = deque()
                q.append(i)
                color[i] = 0
                cnt = [0, 0]
                cnt[0] +=1
                ok = True
                while q and ok:
                    u = q.popleft()
                    for (v, w) in adj[u]:
                        expected_color = color[u] ^ w
                        if color[v] == -1:
                            color[v] = expected_color
                            cnt[expected_color] +=1
                            q.append(v)
                        elif color[v] != expected_color:
                            ok = False
                            break
                    if not ok:
                        break
                if not ok:
                    possible = False
                    break
                total += max(cnt[0], cnt[1])
        if possible:
            print(total)
        else:
            print(-1)

solve()
